evals.prompt: Can you analyze all the Nifty 50 stocks and give me a comprehensive CSV report showing which ones are the best buys right now? I need to see the scores across different dimensions.
evals.expected_output: A CSV file with all 50 Nifty stocks ranked by Trade Score, showing Technical, Fundamental, Sentiment, and Risk scores, plus recommendations. Should be sorted with highest scores first.

evals.prompt: I want to do a bulk analysis of India's top 50 companies. Screen the entire Nifty 50 index and consolidate the results so I can compare them.
evals.expected_output: A CSV file containing comprehensive analysis of all Nifty 50 stocks with scores and recommendations, properly ranked and formatted for easy comparison.

evals.prompt: Hey, can you run a complete analysis on the nifty50 stocks? I need to see which sectors and companies are looking strong. Export everything to a csv so i can sort and filter later.
evals.expected_output: A CSV file with all 50 stocks analyzed, ranked by performance, with all relevant scores and a recommendation for each stock. Should handle any failures gracefully.
